/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/extending.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,extending.so -o extending.so CMakeFiles/extending.dir/extending.cpp.o   -L/home/jerome/Documents/pybind11/libzedmd-python-pybind11-extension/extern/libzedmd/build  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jerome/Documents/pybind11/libzedmd-python-pybind11-extension/extern/libzedmd/build /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -lzedmd -lserialport
